name: Flash
description: Outrun the clock and stack points fast.
passive: High-speed pressure style. Answers quickly and piles on damage through sheer volume — the faster you strike, the harder every hit lands.
ultimateDescription: For 8 seconds, each correct answer deals +1 extra damage. Sustained non-stop pressure.

name: Shadow
description: Break the opponent rhythm with precise disruption.
passive: Timing and control. Charges ultimate slightly faster — more opportunities to shut the opponent down at the worst moment.
ultimateDescription: Locks the opponent out for 5 seconds — they cannot type a single answer while you freely score.

name: Guardian
description: Hold your line and neutralize incoming pressure.
passive: Defensive anchor. Consistent answering builds an unbreakable wall — absorb pressure while you chip away at the opponent.
ultimateDescription: Deploys a fortress shield for 10 seconds that absorbs up to 2 incoming abilities — including Jam.

name: Inferno
description: Convert one clean answer into explosive momentum.
passive: Pure burst power. Slightly slower charge — but when the ultimate fires, it deals more damage than any other character can match.
ultimateDescription: Arms your next correct answer for a devastating +3 bonus damage hit — maximum burst in a single shot.
